name: Specialized Transport
registry_source: NC Secretary of State (direct query blocked); Alignable / Yelp / YellowPages corroborated
notes: Best identifier match: 'Specialized Transport' at 2380 Industrial Park Rd, Lincolnton, NC 28092 (phone 704-735-5676). Non-emergency medical / wheelchair / paratransit + airport shuttle / limo for events. Owner: C. Dean Hastings. Business started ~1997 (~28 years). No matching USDOT in SAFER for Lincolnton NC 28092 ('SPECIALIZED TRANSPORT INC' USDOT 3085397 is in Axton VA; 'SPECIALIZED TRANSPORT LLC' USDOT 4188609 is in Bloomingdale GA; 'SPECIALIZED TRANSPORT LLC' USDOT 3673111 also non-NC). Operates intrastate, likely under NCDMV/NCDOT authority only. NC SOS profile pages exist (links found) but blocked from direct fetch (403).
